{{Quote|Instruct the ''Constrainer'' and ''Sentinel'' to secure from entrapment duty and return to their positions in the demarcation line.|Grand Admiral Thrawn issues orders to the ''Sentinel'' during the Battle of Bilbringi|<ref name="TLC" />}}
The '''''Sentinel''''' was an [[Interdictor/Legends|Interdictor]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] serving the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] [[Thrawn campaign|campaign]] against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]. During the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]], the ''Sentinel'', together with a set of other Interdictor cruisers that included the [[Constrainer/Legends|''Constrainer'']], were positioned to intercept the incoming New Republic [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|flotilla]] for the rest of the Imperial units to assault them. After the Interdictors pulled the New Republic forces out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], Thrawn instructed the ''Constrainer'' and the ''Sentinel'' to return to the Imperial line of battle. The engagement eventually ended with the [[Death/Legends|death]] of Thrawn carried out by [[Gender/Legends|his]] bodyguard, [[Rukh/Legends|Rukh]], and an Imperial retreat.<ref name="TLC" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Sentinel'' first appeared in the [[1991]] novel ''[[The Last Command]]'', the closing installment of [[Timothy Zahn]]'s ''[[Star Wars: The Thrawn Trilogy]]''. ''The Last Command'' refers to the ''Sentinel'' as an "Interdictor Cruiser,"<ref name="TLC" /> which are variably depicted in [[Star Wars: Dark Force Rising (comic series)|''Dark Force Rising'']] and [[Star Wars: The Last Command (comic series)|''The Last Command'']] comics as either [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruisers]], such as the [[Constrainer/Legends|''Constrainer'']],<ref name="Dark Force Rising 1">[[Dark Force Rising 1|''Dark Force Rising'' 1]]</ref><ref name="The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia">{{CSWECite|1|138|''Constrainer''}}</ref> or [[Interdictor-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Interdictor''-class Star Destroyers]].<ref name="The Last Command 2">[[The Last Command 2|''The Last Command'' 2]]</ref> In the [[2006]] strategy game ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'', ''Sentinel'' is a possible name assigned by the game to [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruisers]] constructed by the Imperial player.<ref name="EaW" />
